name: backlinks-csv-importer-extension
description: Chrome extension for importing backlinks CSV data

scripts.build: esbuild src/sidepanel.ts --bundle --outfile=sidepanel.js --format=iife && esbuild src/background.ts --bundle --outfile=background.js --format=iife && esbuild src/content-script.ts --bundle --outfile=content-script.js --format=iife
